escalation.rationale: U.S.-Israel war with Iran continues with Strait of Hormuz blockade, oil tanker attacks, and cyberattacks on medical infrastructure.

ticker_items: Iran attacks oil tankers in Persian Gulf with explosions
New Iranian Supreme Leader vows continued Strait of Hormuz blockade
Iranian hackers strike U.S. medical device maker Stryker globally
Oil surges over $100 as U.S. admits cannot control Hormuz
Over 1,100 children killed or injured since Iran war started

middle_east.description: Iranian forces attacked two oil tankers with explosions in the Persian Gulf.
Video evidence suggests U.S. struck a girls' elementary school in Minab, Iran.

middle_east.text: I am a pretty religious person, or at least I was.
middle_east.speaker: Orian
middle_east.title: Israeli teen survivor

middle_east.text: NATO forces will strike into the heart of Russia if Moscow invades Baltic countries.
middle_east.speaker: Estonia's Foreign Minister
middle_east.title: Foreign Minister

middle_east.text: Take their skirts off, maybe put some boots on and help the rest of the world out.
middle_east.speaker: GOP Senator
middle_east.title: U.S. Senator

observers.description: President vetoed participation in EU's defense spending loan scheme, prompting PM Tusk to call extraordinary cabinet meeting. Poland appears to be resisting deeper EU military integration amid regional tensions.

German army head announced plans to use Ukrainian military trainers to prepare for potential war with Russia by 2029. This represents significant escalation in German military preparedness and cooperation with Ukraine.

Foreign Minister declared Europe was like an 'old fat lazy cat' after Cold War and vowed NATO would strike 'into the heart of Russia' if Moscow invades Baltic countries. Estonia is urging allies to prepare for Russian veterans returning from Ukraine war.

financial.notes: Oil surged over $100 per barrel as markets fear prolonged Iran war with U.S. unable to control Strait of Hormuz.

update_log.text: Oil prices surge over $100 as U.S. admits inability to control Strait of Hormuz
Iranian hackers attack U.S. medical device company Stryker with global system shutdown
Iran's new Supreme Leader issues first statement vowing continued Strait of Hormuz blockade
Iranian forces attack two oil tankers in Persian Gulf with dramatic explosions
Video evidence suggests U.S. strike on girls' elementary school in Minab, Iran
